edits.rationale: The content of the clause has changed in v2 to specify the assessment requirements for hydraulic presses during the ORR process.
edits.new_text: as outlined in AIQS 2.3.2 — Equipment assessment requirements. Hydraulic presses shall undergo a thorough assessment during the ORR process. This assessment shall include verification of operational functionality, safety compliance, and maintenance status.

edits.rationale: The content of AIQS 3.2.1 has changed in v2, requiring an update to the citation in the documentation process.
edits.old_text: Submit the documentation for review as per AIQS 3.2.1.
edits.new_text: Submit the documentation for review as per AIQS 3.2.1 — Calibration of torque equipment.
